description_long: This storage box is a cubic container with a wood-textured exterior, featuring vertical wood grain patterns on all visible sides. The edges of the box are slightly beveled, and the top surface appears to have a subtle, frosted or weathered finish, possibly indicating exposure to the elements or a protective coating. The box's surfaces are glossy, reflecting light and giving it a polished appearance. There is a faint white residue or trim along the bottom and top edges, suggesting either accumulated dust, snow, or a design feature. No visible handles, locks, or labeling areas are present, and the box appears to be a solid, closed unit. Its robust construction and neutral design make it suitable for use in garages, storage rooms, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A cubic, wood-textured storage box with glossy surfaces, beveled edges, and faint white trim along the top and bottom. The box is solid, closed, and lacks visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wood-paneled face with vertical grain, glossy finish, and white trim along the top and bottom edges.
description_view_1: This side displays a similar wood grain pattern, but the wood appears slightly darker and the white trim is more pronounced at the bottom.
description_view_2: The wood grain is more uniform and the glossy reflection is more visible, with the white trim continuing along the bottom edge.
description_view_3: This view shows the darkest wood tone and the most distinct vertical grain lines, with consistent white trim at the top and bottom.
